title: Seguir + gerund
subtitle: Say still doing something.
overview: Seguir + gerund means to continue doing / still be doing.
It is useful for progress and problems.

items.es: Sigo estudiando español todos los días.
items.en: I am still studying Spanish every day.

items.es: Ana sigue trabajando en la oficina.
items.en: Ana is still working at the office.

items.es: Sigue lloviendo, así que no salgo.
items.en: It is still raining, so I am not going out.
We are still waiting for an answer.
Are you still living in the same city?
